label: 401k employee contribution limit, 2026
source: IRS.gov — verified live against retirement-topics page + IR-2025-111
notes: Catch-up 50+: $8,000 extra ($32,500 total). Ages 60-63: $11,250 catch-up (SECURE 2.0). Limits adjust each year.

label: IRA/Roth IRA contribution limit, 2026
source: IRS.gov — verified live against retirement-topics page + IR-2025-111
notes: Catch-up 50+: $1,100 extra ($8,600 total). Roth income phase-out 2026: $153k-$168k single, $242k-$252k married joint.

label: HSA contribution limit, 2026
source: IRS Rev. Proc. 2025-19 — verified live, corroborated by IRS Notice 26-05
notes: Requires a high-deductible health plan. verify_url is a PDF — research surfaces it via search snippets rather than full fetch.

label: Typical high-yield savings (HYSA) rate
source: General market level (moves with the Fed)
notes: Changes with Fed policy. Compare current offers; any big bank paying ~0.01% is the trap.

label: Federal long-term capital gains rates
notes: CALIFORNIA gives no discount — state taxes gains as ordinary income on top.
